evals.prompt: Go to https://example.com and extract the page title, heading text, and the link URL and text of the first link on the page. Save the results to /tmp/example_com_info.txt.
evals.expected_output: A text file at /tmp/example_com_info.txt containing the page title, h1 heading text, and the first link's URL and text.
expectations: Browser opened successfully with cmux browser open
Page loaded and wait command was used
get text h1 returned the heading content
find first link extracted href and text

evals.prompt: Open https://www.google.com in a browser, wait for it to load, take a snapshot of the page, get the page title, and save a screenshot to /tmp/google_homepage.png. Then close the browser.
evals.expected_output: A snapshot showing the Google DOM structure, the page title 'Google', and a screenshot file at /tmp/google_homepage.png.
expectations: Browser opened with cmux browser open

evals.prompt: Browse to https://httpbin.org/forms/post, fill out the form fields (custname: Test User, custtel: 1234567890, custemail: test@example.com, size: medium, delivery: 12:30, comments: Great service), submit the form by clicking the submit button, wait for the result page to load, and save the page title and visible text content to /tmp/httpbin_form_result.txt.
evals.expected_output: A text file showing the submitted form result page title and visible text from httpbin.org.
expectations: fill commands used for all form fields
click used on submit button with --snapshot-after
wait used to wait for result page
get title and get text captured from result page
